google-alphabet.summary: KRW 421B (~$310M) KFTC fine (Sep 2021) for forcing Android device makers to use Google's OS version (Anti-Fragmentation Agreement).

qualcomm.summary: KRW 1.03T (~$854M) KFTC fine (2017, partially upheld 2023) for abuse of dominance in CDMA/WCDMA/LTE standard-essential patents.

meta-platforms.summary: KRW 30.8B (~$22M) Korean PIPC fine (Sep 2022) for unlawfully collecting behavioral data without consent.

apple.summary: KFTC investigation (2024) into App Store anti-steering; KFTC also enforced 2021 In-App Payment Act requiring third-party billing options.

coupang.summary: KRW 140B (~$100M) KFTC fine (Jun 2024) for manipulating product search rankings to favor private-label brands.
